title: Safely Modifying Your Hosts File with Gas Mask

title: Uploading EC2 Logs to S3 on Shutdown
summary: If you’ve ever used an auto scaling group (ASG) on AWS, you’ve probably had an EC2 instance fail and get removed from the ASG.
